Business meaning: Percentage of completed shots delivered on or before the deadline.
Recommended calculation: Completed shots with delivery_date <= deadline ÷ completed shots
Cleaning caveat: Standardize completed statuses and parse dates before calculation.

Business meaning: Average elapsed production days from start to delivery.
Recommended calculation: Average(delivery_date - start_date) for valid completed shots
Cleaning caveat: Exclude invalid or negative date intervals.

Business meaning: Share of available weekly capacity used on production work.
Cleaning caveat: Normalize capacity and remove duplicate/invalid time entries.

Business meaning: Average revision rounds per delivered shot and percentage exceeding a threshold.
Cleaning caveat: Reconcile reported counts with review-event records.

Business meaning: How closely estimated effort matches actual effort.
Cleaning caveat: Handle zero, missing, text, and negative hour values.

Business meaning: Absolute and percentage difference between planned and actual hours.
Cleaning caveat: Consider time-entry sums as a secondary validation source.

Recommended calculation: COUNT completed shots grouped by delivery week

Business meaning: Open shots whose deadline is before the reporting date.
Recommended calculation: COUNT open shots where deadline < as-of date
Cleaning caveat: Use 2026-06-30 as the initial as-of date.

Business meaning: Composite view of delay, utilization, revisions, and work-in-progress.
Recommended calculation: Department-level normalized delay + utilization + revisions + WIP
Cleaning caveat: Define and document a transparent weighting approach.

Business meaning: Revision volume and review response time attributable to each client.
Recommended calculation: Client review events and response time by client/project
